notes: Self-contained auxiliary file defining AlgHom.pullbackKaehler via a twisted-module wrapper TwistedKaehler to avoid Module S Ω[S/R] typeclass conflicts; the universal property Derivation.liftKaehlerDifferential is the key mathlib lemma. No sorries, no maxHeartbeats overrides, no long proofs (longest ~19 lines for derivationCompHom). This construction may overlap with or be a precursor to mathlib's Algebra.Kaehler.Basic pullback machinery.
